title: FENS | 2025-2026 Spring Semester Make-Up Exams Announcement
content:
FENS | 2025-2026 Spring Semester Make-Up Exams Announcement

Dear Students,

Students who cannot attend the exams due to valid excuses (illness, etc.) must upload their Make-Up Exam Request petitions and relevant evidence documents to the Student Petition System

https://online.uskudar.edu.tr/

by Sunday,

. You can log in to the system with your student e-mail address and password that you use in ALMS/STIX.

Make-up Exams will be held between

on the day and time determined by the course instructor, and you can learn the details through the course instructor's announcements.

We wish you success in your exams.

UU Faculties
